ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where attendance is recorded */,
  "individuals_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of individuals attending */,
  "vehicles_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles attending */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when individuals check in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when individuals check out */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who checked in */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, bike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., gym, pool) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility within the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_records" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity for which enrollment is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the enrollment record */,
  "enrolled_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of individuals enrolled in the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who enrolled */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_records_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor for the activity */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilization_rates" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the utilization record */,
  "utilization_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of utilization for the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility on the given date */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of individuals attending */,
  "utilization_type" TEXT /* Type of utilization (e.g., peak, off-peak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_rates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_members" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, trainer) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the staff member manages */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ended their employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who handled the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Level of membership (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the center */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility for which statistics are recorded */,
  "week_day" TEXT /* Day of the week for which statistics are calculated */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance for the day */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance for the week */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of the day for the facility */,
  "low_hours" TEXT /* Low hours of the day for the facility */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of stay in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_statistics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "membership_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership type */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the membership */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the membership (e.g., 1 month, 1 year) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits included in the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being scheduled */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the activity takes place */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the scheduled activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor for the scheduled activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., scheduled, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES staff_members ("staff_id")
)
